nextGate: Human gate only. Say 「次フェーズへ」 when the runtime feels stable and the remaining contract review is acceptable.
manualHandshake: Map cannot push to chat. Review work happens on-map; human sends chat only for major checkpoints and phase gates.

reviews.question: Should the progress board be required to trace to workspace and review nodes?

pros: Human can judge from the board without blind trust
Blocked or ready state can be justified by drill-down
cons: Board renderer must maintain alias references

options.text: No, board can stay as a pure summary
cons: Board loses authority as a progress view

reviews.question: Is manual chat notification acceptable while map-to-chat send does not exist?

options.text: Yes, keep review in map and send only checkpoints by hand
pros: Avoids waiting for missing chat API
cons: Human still performs milestone handoff manually

reviews.question: Which concrete contract should be written next: implementation or timeseries?

pros: Immediately useful for existing PJ02 assets
Clarifies a second major facet family early
cons: Less directly connected to current importer work

reviews.question: What should count as enough to say 「次フェーズへ」 for PJ02?

options.text: Three-view runtime works and the next contract choice is settled
cons: Leaves Review Mode implementation to another track

options.text: Wait until Review Mode itself exists
cons: Couples PJ02 progress to another team too early
